title: Add Tasks
description: Add keyword-based search tasks to scrape Google Search results

content.introduction: Add keyword-based tasks to scrape Google Search results. Each task represents a search query that will be executed on Google.

rows.description: Hash of your squid configured with the google-search-scraper crawler
Array of task objects, each containing a `keyword` field
The search query to execute on Google

proTips.content: You can add multiple keywords in a single request for bulk searches.
Configure search parameters like country, language, and max_pages in the squid settings.

seo.title: Add Tasks - Google Search Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add keyword-based search tasks to scrape Google Search results.
